purpose: Physical facility coordinates (WGS84, ±0.001° / ~100 m precision target) for national metrology institutes and university NTP server hosts. Coordinates are for the primary lab or campus building unless noted. Source confidence is documented per entry.
schema_notes: lat/lon to 3 decimal places (≈111 m per 0.001° in latitude).
source_note documents the derivation method and confidence level.
source_urls are authoritative or reference pages used to confirm the address; Wikipedia GeoHack coords are cited where extracted from the infobox.
Entries marked '~' or 'estimated' have positional uncertainty of ±0.5–2 km; treat as city-level rather than gate-level coordinates.

NMI Australia state facilities (Melbourne, Perth, Adelaide, Brisbane) have confirmed NTP hostnames (ntp.XX.nmi.gov.au) but exact building addresses are not publicly documented; coordinates are regional office estimates.

entries.address: 69 Gracefield Road, Lower Hutt 5010, New Zealand
entries.source_note: MSL NZ operates UTC(MSL) within Callaghan Innovation's Gracefield campus. Coordinates from OSM / satellite imagery for 69 Gracefield Road building cluster. NTP pool: pool.msltime.measurement.govt.nz. Confidence: ±200 m.

entries.address: 100 Bureau Drive, Gaithersburg, MD 20899, USA
entries.source_note: NIST HQ confirmed via nist.gov/about-nist/visit ('Gate A at W. Diamond Ave. and 100 Bureau Drive'). The Time & Frequency Division operates from Boulder CO, but Gaithersburg is the legal headquarters. NTP servers: time.nist.gov, time-a-g.nist.gov, time-b-g.nist.gov, time-a-b.nist.gov. Confidence: ±100 m.

entries.address: 325 Broadway, Boulder, CO 80305, USA
entries.source_note: NIST main gate confirmed via nist.gov/about-nist/visit ('At the main gate, 325 Broadway'). This campus houses the Time & Frequency Division, atomic clocks driving UTC(NIST), and NIST Internet Time Service. Confidence: ±100 m.

entries.address: 2000 East County Road 58, Fort Collins, CO 80524, USA
entries.source_note: Address confirmed from WWV station ID announcement ('2000 East County Road 58, Fort Collins, Colorado, 80524'). Wikipedia GeoHack infobox: 40°40'47"N 105°02'33"W → 40.680°N, 105.043°W. Individual antenna coordinates vary by ±30 m across the 10 MHz (40.680, -105.041) and 2.5 MHz (40.682, -105.043) towers; centroid used. Confidence: ±50 m.

entries.authority: NICT Japan (National Institute of Information and Communications Technology)
entries.address: 4-2-1 Nukui-Kitamachi, Koganei, Tokyo 184-8795, Japan
entries.source_note: Wikipedia GeoHack infobox: 35°42'33.3"N 139°29'16"E → 35.7093°N, 139.4878°E, rounded to 35.709, 139.488. NICT operates UTC(NICT), JJY time signal, and ntp.nict.jp stratum-1. Confidence: ±50 m.

entries.authority: KRISS South Korea (Korea Research Institute of Standards and Science)
entries.address: 267 Gajeong-ro, Yuseong-gu, Daejeon 34113, South Korea
entries.source_note: Wikipedia confirms location as 'Yuseong District, Daejeon'. Street address 267 Gajeong-ro (in the Daedeok Science Town area) from KRISS official site. Coordinates from OSM geocoding of that address. NTP: time.kriss.re.kr. Confidence: ±200 m.

entries.address: Hampton Road, Teddington, TW11 0LW, England, UK
entries.source_note: Wikipedia GeoHack infobox: 51°25'35"N 0°20'37"W → 51.4264°N, 0.3436°W, rounded to 51.426, -0.344. Address from NPL Wikipedia infobox and Reference 15 ('Hampton Road, Teddington, Middlesex, United Kingdom, TW11 0LW'). NTP: ntp1.npl.co.uk, ntp2.npl.co.uk. Confidence: ±50 m.

entries.address: 61 avenue de l'Observatoire, 75014 Paris, France
entries.source_note: Historic Paris meridian passes through this site (2°20'14"E). Standard coordinates for Observatoire de Paris: 48°50'11"N, 2°20'11"E → 48.836°N, 2.335°E. LNE-SYRTE (Système de Référence Temps-Espace) is the French primary time lab, operated jointly by CNRS/Paris Observatory/Sorbonne/LNE. NTP: ntp.obspm.fr. Confidence: ±50 m.

entries.address: Bundesallee 100, 38116 Braunschweig, Germany
entries.source_note: Wikipedia GeoHack infobox: 52°17'43"N 10°27'49"E → 52.2953°N, 10.4636°E, rounded to 52.295, 10.464. Atomic clocks and UTC(PTB) are maintained here; DCF77 transmitter is ~25 km west at Mainflingen. NTP: ptbtime1.ptb.de, ptbtime2.ptb.de, ptbtime3.ptb.de. Confidence: ±50 m.

entries.authority: INRiM Italy (Istituto Nazionale di Ricerca Metrologica)
entries.address: Strada delle Cacce 91, 10135 Torino, Italy
entries.source_note: Official INRiM address: Strada delle Cacce 91, 10135 Turin. Coordinates from OSM/Google Maps geocoding of that address. INRiM maintains UTC(IT). NTP: ntp1.inrim.it, ntp2.inrim.it. Confidence: ±200 m.

entries.address: 1200 Montreal Road, Ottawa, ON K1A 0R6, Canada
entries.source_note: NRC headquarters campus at Montreal Road. The Herzberg Astronomy & Astrophysics Research Centre (time section) is on this campus. UTC(NRC) is generated here; CHU radio station transmitter is near Ottawa. NTP: time.chu.nrc.ca, ntp1.nrc.ca. Confidence: ±200 m.

entries.authority: NTSC China (National Time Service Center, Chinese Academy of Sciences)
entries.address: Lintong District, Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, China (BPM station: Pucheng Road, Lintong)
entries.source_note: NTSC (formerly Shaanxi Astronomical Observatory) has two main sites: the Xi'an city headquarters (~34.233, 108.912) and the Lintong observation/time-signal station where atomic clocks and BPM shortwave transmitter live. Lintong station coordinates estimated from published NTSC maps and satellite imagery (~34.376, 109.215). NTP: ntp.ntsc.ac.cn (stratum-1 from Lintong). Wikipedia confirms headquarters in Xi'an, Shaanxi. Confidence: ±1 km (Lintong site).

entries.address: km 4.5 Carretera a Los Cués, El Marqués, Querétaro 76246, Mexico
entries.source_note: Official CENAM address published on cenam.mx. Coordinates from OSM geocoding of 'km 4.5 Carretera a Los Cués, El Marqués, Querétaro'; facility is east of downtown Querétaro in the Carretones area. CENAM maintains UTC(CNM). NTP: cronos.cenam.mx, ntp2.cenam.mx. Confidence: ±500 m.

entries.address: Avenida Montes de Oca 2124, C1270ABV Buenos Aires, Argentina
entries.source_note: SHN (Argentine Naval Hydrographic Service) maintains Argentina's official time standard and operates time signal TBF/ NTP services. Address: Av. Montes de Oca 2124, Buenos Aires. Coordinates from OSM geocoding of that address in Barracas/South BA. SHNN and ntp.srv.hora.shoa.cl are Chilean; Argentina's SHN is ntp.hora.shoa-ar is often confused—Argentina's NTP is at hora.smn.gov.ar or ntp.shoa.gov.ar. Confidence: ±300 m.

entries.authority: NIC.br / NTP.br (Núcleo de Informação e Coordenação do Ponto BR)
entries.address: Av. das Nações Unidas 11541, 7th floor, Brooklin Novo, São Paulo SP 04578-000, Brazil
entries.source_note: NIC.br (CGI.br / CEWEB.br) published address: WTC Tower III, Brooklin Novo, São Paulo. NTP.br operates Brazil's stratum-1 NTP infrastructure. NTP pool: pool.ntp.br, a.st1.ntp.br, b.st1.ntp.br, c.st1.ntp.br, d.st1.ntp.br. Coordinates from OSM geocoding of WTC João Dória/Av. Nações Unidas 11541. Confidence: ±200 m.

entries.authority: CSIR-NPL India (National Physical Laboratory, Council of Scientific & Industrial Research)
entries.address: Dr. K.S. Krishnan Marg, New Delhi 110012, India
entries.source_note: CSIR-NPL official address: Dr. K.S. Krishnan Marg (formerly Hillside Road), New Delhi. The lab maintains UTC(NPLI) and operates NTP servers. Coordinates from OSM geocoding (~Pusa area). NTP: samay1.nic.in, samay2.nic.in (NIC-hosted stratum-1 traceable to CSIR-NPL). Confidence: ±300 m.

entries.authority: BMKG Indonesia (Badan Meteorologi, Klimatologi, dan Geofisika)
entries.address: Jalan Angkasa I No. 2, Kemayoran, Jakarta Pusat 10720, Indonesia
entries.source_note: BMKG official headquarters address per bmkg.go.id. BMKG operates Indonesia's official time-standard distribution (UTC+7 WIB). NTP: ntp.bmkg.go.id. Coordinates from OSM geocoding of Jl. Angkasa I No. 2, Kemayoran. Confidence: ±300 m.

entries.authority: VNIIFTRI Russia (Всероссийский НИИ физико-технических и радиотехнических измерений)
entries.address: Mendeleevo, Solnechnogorsky District, Moscow Oblast 141570, Russia
entries.source_note: VNIIFTRI headquarters at Mendeleevo (~40 km north of Moscow). UTC(SU) primary cesium and hydrogen-maser clock ensemble is on this site. Coordinates from published Russian-language references and satellite imagery. NTP: ntp1.vniiftri.ru, ntp2.vniiftri.ru, ntp3.vniiftri.ru, ntp4.vniiftri.ru. Confidence: ±500 m.

entries.address: Khabarovsk, Khabarovsk Krai, Russia (exact street address not publicly confirmed)
entries.source_note: VNIIFTRI operates a Far-Eastern branch in Khabarovsk responsible for UTC+10 zone time dissemination. Exact street address is not confirmed from open sources. Coordinates are an estimate for central-east Khabarovsk city (near known government/scientific district). Confidence: ±2 km (city-level estimate).

entries.authority: SASO / SSMQO Saudi Arabia (Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization)
entries.address: King Abdulaziz Road (Olaya district), Riyadh 11514, Saudi Arabia
entries.source_note: SASO (formerly Saudi Arabian Standards Organization) NTP infrastructure is operated from their Riyadh headquarters. Street address from saso.gov.sa contact forms. Coordinates are estimated for the Olaya/north-Riyadh government complex area. NTP: ntp.saso.gov.sa (candidate). Confidence: ±1 km.

entries.authority: NMISA South Africa (National Metrology Institute of South Africa)
entries.address: Building 5, CSIR Campus, Meiring Naudé Road, Brummeria, Pretoria 0184, South Africa
entries.source_note: NMISA (formerly CSIR NMI) is housed at the CSIR campus, Meiring Naudé Road, Pretoria. Maintains UTC(ZA). Coordinates from OSM for CSIR main entrance, Brummeria. NTP: ntp1.nmisa.org, ntp2.nmisa.org. Confidence: ±200 m.

entries.address: P.K. 54, 41470 Gebze, Kocaeli, Turkey
entries.source_note: TÜBİTAK UME (National Metrology Institute of Turkey) address P.K. 54, 41470 Gebze. Located in the Gebze Organized Industrial Zone. UTC(TUBITAK) maintained here. NTP: ntp1.tubitak.gov.tr, ntp2.tubitak.gov.tr. Coordinates from OSM geocoding of Gebze industrial zone. Confidence: ±500 m.

entries.authority: ROA Spain (Real Observatorio de la Armada)
entries.address: Cecilio Pujazón s/n, 11100 San Fernando, Cádiz, Spain
entries.source_note: ROA (Royal Observatory of the Navy) is Spain's time authority, maintaining UTC(ROA). Address: Cecilio Pujazón s/n, San Fernando. The observatory sits on the Isla de León. Coordinates from OSM. NTP: hora.roa.es. Confidence: ±200 m.

entries.authority: VSL Netherlands (Van Swinden Laboratorium / Dutch Metrology Institute)
entries.address: Thijsseweg 11, 2629 JA Delft, Netherlands
entries.source_note: VSL official address: Thijsseweg 11, 2629 JA Delft. UTC(VSL) maintained here. NTP servers hosted via SURF/NLnet or directly. Coordinates from OSM. NTP: ntp0.nl.net, ntp1.nl.net (VSL-affiliated). Confidence: ±200 m.

entries.address: Lindenweg 50, 3084 Wabern b. Bern, Switzerland
entries.source_note: METAS (Eidgenössisches Institut für Metrologie) official address: Lindenweg 50, 3084 Wabern. Maintains UTC(CH). NTP: ntp.metas.ch (stratum-1). Coordinates from OSM geocoding of Lindenweg 50. Confidence: ±100 m.

entries.facility: Netnod Headquarters / Primary NTP Infrastructure, Stockholm
entries.address: Franzéngatan 5, 112 51 Stockholm, Sweden
entries.source_note: Netnod registered office: Franzéngatan 5, Kungsholmen, Stockholm. Netnod's NTP infrastructure (ntp.netnod.se, nts.netnod.se) is distributed across multiple Stockholm data centres (Interxion, Equinix). This coordinate reflects the Franzéngatan registered office; actual server hardware sits at co-lo facilities in the Kista/Nacka corridor (~59.403, 17.937). Confidence (registered office): ±200 m.

entries.address: Fetveien 99, 2007 Kjeller, Akershus, Norway
entries.source_note: Justervesenet official address: Fetveien 99, 2007 Kjeller. Maintains UTC(JV). NTP: ntp1.justervesenet.no, ntp2.justervesenet.no. Coordinates from OSM geocoding. Confidence: ±200 m.

entries.authority: GUM Poland (Główny Urząd Miar / Central Office of Measures)
entries.address: ul. Elektoralna 2, 00-139 Warsaw, Poland
entries.source_note: GUM official address: ul. Elektoralna 2, Warsaw (old-town adjacent, near Mirów). UTC(PL) is maintained at GUM. NTP: tempus1.gum.gov.pl, tempus2.gum.gov.pl. Coordinates from OSM geocoding of ul. Elektoralna 2. Confidence: ±200 m.

entries.authority: ROB Belgium (Observatoire Royal de Belgique / Koninklijke Sterrenwacht van België)
entries.facility: Royal Observatory of Belgium, Uccle Campus
entries.address: Avenue Circulaire 3, B-1180 Uccle, Brussels, Belgium
entries.source_note: ROB official address: Avenue Circulaire 3, 1180 Uccle. The Time Department maintains UTC(ORB). NTP: ntp1.oma.be, ntp2.oma.be (OMA = Observatoire Royal / Koninklijke Sterrenwacht). Coordinates from OSM; latitude 50.799, longitude 4.358. Confidence: ±100 m.

entries.authority: BEV Austria (Bundesamt für Eich- und Vermessungswesen)
entries.address: Arltgasse 35, 1160 Vienna, Austria
entries.source_note: BEV official address: Arltgasse 35, 1160 Wien (Ottakring district). Maintains UTC(BEV). NTP: ntp1.bev.gv.at, ntp2.bev.gv.at. Coordinates from OSM geocoding. Confidence: ±200 m.

entries.authority: DFM Denmark (DFM A/S – Danish Fundamental Metrology)
entries.facility: DFM at DTU Campus, Kongens Lyngby
entries.address: Matematiktorvet 307-308, 2800 Kongens Lyngby (DTU), Denmark
entries.source_note: NOTE: DFM A/S is located on the DTU (Technical University of Denmark) campus in Kongens Lyngby, NOT in Taastrup as sometimes cited in older pool-server references. Previous DELTA/Force Technology labs were in Taastrup (~55.655, 12.302) but DFM's address since its current form is 55.786, 12.523 (DTU). NTP: ntp.dfm.dk. Confidence (DTU campus): ±200 m.

entries.authority: VTT MIKES Finland (VTT Technical Research Centre, MIKES Metrology)
entries.address: Tekniikantie 1, 02150 Espoo (Otaniemi), Finland
entries.source_note: MIKES (Centre for Metrology and Accreditation) merged into VTT in 2015. The MIKES time & frequency laboratory is on VTT's Otaniemi campus. UTC(FI) generated here. NTP: ntp1.mikes.fi, ntp2.mikes.fi. Coordinates from OSM for Tekniikantie 1, Otaniemi. Confidence: ±200 m.

entries.address: University Road, Galway H91 TK33, Ireland
entries.source_note: NTP server ntp.nuigalway.ie (old hostname retained since the 2022 renaming to University of Galway) is operated by IT Services on the main campus. Campus entrance on University Road. Coordinates from OSM. Confidence: ±200 m (IT building location unspecified).

entries.authority: IST Portugal (Instituto Superior Técnico, Universidade de Lisboa)
entries.address: Avenida Rovisco Pais 1, 1049-001 Lisboa, Portugal
entries.source_note: IST (Técnico Lisboa) Alameda campus. NTP server ntp.ist.utl.pt (legacy hostname, still resolves) operated by IST's RNIT / IT network services. Central campus at Av. Rovisco Pais. Coordinates from OSM. Confidence: ±200 m.

entries.authority: SHOA Chile (Servicio Hidrográfico y Oceanográfico de la Armada)
entries.address: Errázuriz 232, Playa Ancha, Valparaíso 2340000, Chile
entries.source_note: SHOA (Chilean Naval Hydrographic and Oceanographic Service) maintains Chile's official UTC(SHM) time and operates ntp.shoa.cl. Address: Errázuriz 232, Playa Ancha, Valparaíso. Coordinates from OSM geocoding. Confidence: ±300 m.

entries.authority: ISOC-IL / IIX Israel (Israel Internet Association / Israel Internet Exchange)
entries.facility: IIX / ISOC-IL NTP infrastructure, Tel Aviv area
entries.address: Tel Aviv metropolitan area, Israel (ISOC-IL: 6 Weizmann St, Tel Aviv; IIX nodes at commercial data centres)
entries.source_note: IIX (Israel Internet Exchange) NTP nodes and ISOC-IL (Internet Society – Israel Chapter) infrastructure are co-located at major Tel Aviv data centres (e.g. Equinix TA1, BIX-IL). ISOC-IL registered office: 6 Weizmann Street, Tel Aviv (~32.087, 34.792). Coordinates rounded to central Tel Aviv as city-level estimate. NTP: ntp.isoc.org.il (candidate). Confidence: ±2 km (exact data-centre location unconfirmed from open sources).

entries.address: 1 Science Park Drive, Singapore 118221
entries.source_note: A*STAR NMC (National Metrology Centre) was at 1 Science Park Drive, Singapore Science Park I. NMC maintains Singapore's time standard traceable to BIPM. In more recent years NMC may operate from 73 Science Park Drive or a shared A*STAR campus. NTP: ntpsg.nmc.a-star.edu.sg or time.nmc.a-star.edu.sg (candidate). Confidence: ±500 m.

entries.authority: NMI Australia (National Measurement Institute) – Sydney HQ
entries.facility: NMI North Ryde Campus (primary UTC(AUS) site)
entries.address: 105 Delhi Road, North Ryde NSW 2113, Australia
entries.source_note: NMI (now part of the Dept. of Industry, Science and Resources) primary campus at 105 Delhi Road, North Ryde. UTC(AUS) atomic clock ensemble maintained here. NTP: ntp.nmi.gov.au, ntp.sydney.nmi.gov.au, ntp.sydney2.nmi.gov.au. Confidence: ±200 m.

entries.facility: NMI Melbourne Regional Office / Time Node
entries.address: Melbourne, VIC (exact NMI building not publicly documented)
entries.source_note: NMI operates ntp.melbourne.nmi.gov.au stratum-1 server. Exact building address for the Melbourne node is not disclosed. Coordinates are an estimate for the Docklands/southern CBD area where Australian government agencies cluster. Confidence: ±5 km.

entries.facility: NMI Perth Regional Office / Time Node
entries.address: Perth, WA (exact NMI building not publicly documented)
entries.source_note: NMI operates ntp.perth.nmi.gov.au stratum-1 server. Exact Perth building address not disclosed. Coordinates are an estimate for the East Perth/Technology Park government precinct. Confidence: ±5 km.

entries.facility: NMI Adelaide Regional Office / Time Node
entries.address: Adelaide, SA (exact NMI building not publicly documented)
entries.source_note: NMI operates ntp.adelaide.nmi.gov.au stratum-1 server. Exact Adelaide building address not disclosed. Coordinates are an estimate for inner Adelaide (Thebarton/CBD government area). Confidence: ±5 km.

entries.facility: NMI Brisbane Regional Office / Time Node
entries.address: Brisbane, QLD (exact NMI building not publicly documented)
entries.source_note: NMI operates ntp.brisbane.nmi.gov.au stratum-1 server. Exact Brisbane building address not disclosed. Coordinates are an estimate for inner Brisbane (Brisbane CBD / South Bank government precinct). Confidence: ±5 km.

entries.address: Grattan Street, Parkville VIC 3010, Australia
entries.source_note: NTP server ntp.unimelb.edu.au operated by University of Melbourne IT Services, Parkville campus. Coordinates for main campus entrance. Confidence: ±200 m.

entries.address: Sullivans Creek Road, Acton ACT 2601, Australia
entries.source_note: NTP server ntp.anu.edu.au operated by ANU IT Services, Acton campus. Coordinates for main campus centroid. Confidence: ±300 m.

entries.facility: University of Adelaide, North Terrace Campus
entries.address: North Terrace, Adelaide SA 5005, Australia
entries.source_note: NTP server ntp.adelaide.edu.au operated by University of Adelaide IT. Main campus on North Terrace. Confidence: ±200 m.

entries.address: Churchill Avenue, Sandy Bay TAS 7005, Australia
entries.source_note: NTP server ntp.utas.edu.au operated by UTas IT, Sandy Bay campus. Coordinates for campus main entrance. Confidence: ±300 m.

entries.address: Wellington Road, Clayton VIC 3800, Australia
entries.source_note: NTP server ntp.monash.edu.au operated by Monash IT, Clayton campus. Coordinates for main campus entrance. Confidence: ±200 m.

entries.address: Kent Street, Bentley WA 6102, Australia
entries.source_note: NTP server ntp.curtin.edu.au operated by Curtin ISTS, Bentley campus. Coordinates for main campus. Confidence: ±200 m.
